scriptLines: source1 derive(ci_beneficiaria = upper(     iif(rlike(regexReplace(ci_beneficiaria, '[-_]', ''), '^[A-Za-z]{2}\\d+'),         concat(substring(regexReplace(ci_beneficiaria, '[-_]', ''), 3, length(regexReplace(ci_beneficiaria, '[-_]', ''))-2), '-', substring(regexReplace(ci_beneficiaria, '[-_]', ''), 1, 2)),         iif(rlike(regexReplace(ci_beneficiaria, '[-_]', ''), '\\d+[A-Za-z]{2}$'),             concat(substring(regexReplace(ci_beneficiaria, '[-_]', ''), 1, length(regexReplace(ci_beneficiaria, '[-_]', ''))-2), '-', right(regexReplace(ci_beneficiaria, '[-_]', ''), 2)),             regexReplace(ci_beneficiaria, '[-_]', '')         )     ) ),

fecha_emision = toString(     iif(isNull(fecha_emision) || trim(fecha_emision) == '', toDate(null()),          iif(instr(fecha_emision, '/') > 0, toDate(fecha_emision, 'dd/MM/yyyy'),              iif(instr(fecha_emision, '-') == 3, toDate(fecha_emision, 'dd-MM-yyyy'),                  toDate(fecha_emision, 'yyyy-MM-dd')             )         )     ),      'yyyy-MM-dd' )) ~> LimpiarDatos
